title: Cbr 2011's Animated Memes
body:
This requires GekcoLib

Cbr 2011's Animated Memes
a sequel to "Cbr 2011's Memes Mod"

This mod doesn't add much. It adds entites like sigh Furry, Seek.

Come on, There HAS to be more!

Unlike "Cbr 2011's Memes Mod" this didn't come with much to add in the first version.
There will be more added in the future though!
